title: Pipe Bomb in the Mail
description: A mod that adds fun little gifts to send to your friends in minecraft!
body:
This Mod adds Pipe Bombs to the Game. Originally made to send Pipe Bombs to your Friends with [Mighty Mail](https://mrcrayfish.com/mods/mighty_mail).

# Types of Pipe Bombs:
## Pipe Bomb:
This Pipe Bomb doesn't do anything. It is the base for all Pipe Bombs.

![Recipe: Pipe Bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5c0518e0691228bca0f4350b1ec4ced53cf25be.png)

## Pickup Pipe Bomb:
This Pipe Bomb explodes when a Player picks it up, as long as it's activated. Shift Right clicking will activate the Pipe Bomb.

![Recipe: Pickup Pipe Bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25e31182a4eaa5812c54267c772202d92b51a954.png)

## Better Pickup Pipe Bomb:
This Pipe Bomb functions the same as the Pickup Pipe Bomb, but with a much larger explosion, that is strong enough to instantly kill someone in full Protection 4 Netherite Armor. (Maybe a bit too overpowered)

![Recipe: Better Pickup Pipe Bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a5060f9953ef2f0725a839a99a8de3d7eddebb9.png)

## Instant Pickup Pipe Bomb:
This Pipe Bomb functions the same as the Pickup Pipe Bomb, but will instantly explode after being touched for 0.5 seconds in total (for safety).

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f60cf6fbe96f32723807dd3fb9020820d2e0a81.png)
